hall_of_fame.title: React Fire: Modernizing React DOM
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: React Fire succeeds now due to advancements in React, TypeScript, and web development, enabling a more maintainable and efficient implementation.

hall_of_fame.title: Add upcoming GPT-3 model
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: GPT-3's massive success and widespread adoption make its integration crucial for the Transformers library.

hall_of_fame.title: Support multiple windows
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: Multiple windows in Alacritty would improve user experience for those using window managers instead of tmux.

last_resurrection.title: Node.js 15+ starts recommending promise based versions by default - Express 5.0 and wrapAsync
last_resurrection.one_line_why: Native support for promise-based APIs and async/await in Express routes will simplify development and improve error handling.
